offer: For property managers overseeing 5–15 buildings, inefficient tracking of work orders causes delayed maintenance responses. We provide streamlined tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of work orders and preventive maintenance across multiple properties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Join community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try work order tracking and maintenance scheduling on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
